case_title: MARIA SAU VA LAI VS. DANIEL LEE

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION TO VACATE CLERKS JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, MARIA SAU VA AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DANIEL AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DANIEL LEE & CO. LLP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S Motion To Vacate Clerks Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
